FFRules.GeneralRules1: Futebol Fever is a 3-reel, 3-rows video slot featuring respins of individual reels, full screen bonus wins and multipliers up to x10.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 10 base bet for %{27} ways, bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 576 ways - 46,656 ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 10.

FFRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

FFRespinFeature.Title: Reel Respin Feature
FFRespinFeature.ReelRespinFeatureExplaination1: At the end of any spin in the main game, a single reel can be respun for multiple times at an additional cost.
FFRespinFeature.ReelRespinFeatureExplaination2: The cost of a respin is calculated separately for each reel.
FFRespinFeature.ReelRespinFeatureExplaination3: The cost of a respin does not indicate a greater or lesser chance of winning.

FFFullScreenFeature.Title: Full Screen Bonus Win
FFFullScreenFeature.FullScreenFeatureExplaination1: When one symbol occupies all of the reel positions, the bonus win will be awarded according to the "Paytable".
FFFullScreenFeature.FullScreenFeatureExplaination2: The win amount calculated from the winning bet ways will not be paid.

FFMultiplierFeature.Title: Multiplier
FFMultiplierFeature.MultiplierFeatureExplaination1: During any winning spin, a multiplier of x2, x3, x5 or x10 may be randomly awarded.
